title: Better Boat Minecart Crafting
description: Better (un)crafting recipes for minecart variants and chest boats.
body:
Uncraft **minecart** with blocks and **chest boats**. 

Chest Boats when used as a crafting ingredient will output an item that turns into a chest and the normal boat in your inventory.

![general recipe format](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203b9af43a441f47473aaec1d15477288245f901.png)

---
